title: spergularia media subsp. angustata
intro: Spergularia media subsp. angustata, also known as Slender Sandwort, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Spergularia media subsp. angustata can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
